title: [mobile-app] Search returns out-of-stock items at top of results
body: Reproduces consistently on iOS and Android. Search 'diapers size 4' at a store where home inventory shows zero — top three results are out of stock at the user's store. Inventory signal isn't a factor in search ranking. We probably need to boost in-stock items in the local store. Customer satisfaction complaints have spiked.

title: [pharmacy] Dual refill paths cause race conditions
body: Refill via the mobile app and refill via the IVR phone line write to different systems. There's no real-time reconciliation, so customers get conflicting status. Pharmacy staff have to call the patient to clarify. We need one system of record (Rx Hub) and both intake channels must write through it.

title: [pos] Lane fully unavailable when WAN is down
body: Stores in the Houston cluster lost internet during the Saturday rush. Cashiers couldn't ring up cash sales because the lane can't look up SKU prices offline. Need a local SQLite cache of pricing/SKU data that refreshes hourly. Cash sales and returns under $50 should work offline. Card sales must remain online per PCI.

title: [loyalty] Customers don't understand how tier downgrades happen
body: Repeated support tickets and survey responses about loyalty tier downgrades feeling sudden. The rules are documented in the help center but not surfaced anywhere customers actually look. Proposal: an in-app 'tier progress' view showing current points, next tier threshold, and when the next evaluation happens.

title: [infrastructure] Polling interval for inventory updates is too aggressive
body: The mobile app polls for inventory updates every 15 seconds when on the product page. This violates the ARB constraint (no polling under 60 seconds). Should switch to subscribing to the inventory event stream.

title: [curbside] Order assigned to wrong store when GPS is inaccurate
body: Customers placing curbside orders from inside the parking lot sometimes have their order assigned to the wrong store (the nearest GPS-determined store, not the one they're actually at). Need a store confirmation step in the curbside flow.
